AddOnInstructionDefinition.Name: Robot
AddOnInstructionDefinition.Description: Adept robot control program OakRiver Reserved Technology
AddOnInstructionDefinition.RevisionNote: Clear approach height when performing inc moves

Parameter.Name: Robot_Commands
Parameter.Description: Commands to move robot from code

Parameter.Name: JumpHeightAbs
Parameter.Description: Absolute Jump Height for 6 Axis Only (max safe Z height)

Parameter.Name: intMotionMultiplierPercent
Parameter.Description: % Multiplier for Speed, Accel and Decel (1-100)

Parameter.Name: bitAutoJog
Parameter.Description: Allow Jogging when not in manual mode

Parameter.Name: bitStopJump
Parameter.Description: Bit to toggle Brake Request to stop jump command moves

Parameter.Name: EnableLocationDownload
Parameter.Description: Enables Location Download Rungs to execute

Parameter.Name: EnablePalletDownload
Parameter.Description: Enables Pallet Download Rungs to execute

LocalTag.Name: TempLocation
LocalTag.Description: Location to store jump move for 6 axis
